data.title: Stingray renews normal course issuer bid, approved to repurchase up to 3,710,428 Subordinate Shares, around 10% of public float.
data.description: Stingray Group Inc., a leading company in music and video content distribution, business services, and advertising solutions, has received approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange for the renewal of its normal course issuer bid. This allows Stingray to buy back a total of 3,710,428 subordinate voting shares and variable subordinate voting shares, which is roughly 10% of the public float of Subordinate Shares as of September 15, 2025. The company's stock is traded under the tickers RAY.A and RAY.B on the TSX.

data.title: Quantum Computing Inc. raises $500 million in oversubscribed private placement, totaling $850 million cash position.
data.description: A group of significant current shareholders, in addition to an initial investment from a renowned global alternative asset manager, spearheaded the recent offering. As a result of this, the company now holds a total cash balance of around $850 million post-closure. This development took place on September 24, 2025, in Hoboken, New Jersey through Quantum Computing Inc.

data.title: Morse Micro and Browan Communications partner to accelerate Wi-Fi HaLow market adoption at The Things Conference in Amsterdam on Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Amsterdam on September 24, 2025, Morse Micro, a top provider of Wi-Fi HaLow silicon solutions, unveiled a technology collaboration with Browan Communications. This partnership aims to boost the global acceptance of Wi-Fi HaLow™. This new venture brings together the expertise of both companies to promote the advancement of this technology.

data.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. will discuss 3rd Quarter 2025 results on October 29, 2025, after the market closes.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Salt Lake City, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter and first nine months of 2025 on October 29, 2025. The report will cover the period ending September 30, 2025, and will be released after the market closes. The Company is scheduled to conduct a related event following the announcement.

data.title: Jimmy Kimmel's comeback episode after suspension attracted 6.2 million viewers, quadrupling the show's usual audience.
data.description: The most recent episode of "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" following its suspension by Disney last week saw nearly four times the usual viewership.

data.title: RippleMatch launches AI-Talent Marketplace in NYC, replacing resumes with verified skills for early-career hiring.
data.description: RippleMatch has just unveiled its AI-Talent Marketplace in New York, aiming to revolutionize early-career hiring processes. Instead of traditional resumes, the platform focuses on verified skills to streamline and enhance recruitment efforts. This innovative approach is set to accelerate and improve the hiring process, promising a more efficient and effective way to connect talent with opportunities.

data.title: Siemens enhances DBO™ by adding natural hazard risk mitigation. Helps US businesses assess building resilience against 20+ hazards.
data.description: Siemens, based in Iselin, N.J., is enhancing its free web-based Digital Business Optimizer (DBO™) platform by introducing a new natural hazard risk mitigation feature. This collaboration with academic partners has resulted in a tool that enables US businesses to evaluate and compare the resilience of their structures and sites against more than 20 location-specific natural hazards including floods, wildfires, earthquakes, hurricanes, and others. This feature assists in analyzing and improving risk management strategies, aiding in the protection of buildings and facilities.

data.title: Upexi reports 174% increase in SOL treasury and 281% increase in net asset value since fiscal year ended June 30, 2025.
data.description: The SOL Treasury saw a significant 174% increase, while the Net Asset Value also saw a remarkable 281% increase since the close of the fiscal year on June 30, 2025.

data.title: AAHRPP accredits ACTIVATO, making it the third organization in Japan. - WASHINGTON, Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, the Association for the Accreditation of Human Research Protection Programs granted full accreditation to ACTIVATO in Sendai, Miyagi, Japan. This nonprofit independent institutional review board becomes the third research organization in Japan to receive this recognition.

data.title: Mirantis releases Mirantis Kubernetes Engine for k0rdent (MKE 4k) 4.1.1 to streamline managing multi-cluster Kubernetes infrastructure.
data.description: Mirantis, a company specializing in Kubernetes-native AI infrastructure, has introduced the availability of Mirantis Kubernetes Engine for k0rdent (MKE 4k) 4.1.1 in Campbell, Calif. This new release aims to streamline operational processes, enhance upgrade predictability, and ensure uniformity across regulated and multi-cloud infrastructures. MKE 4k is designed to simplify the management of multi-cluster infrastructure for developers.

data.title: Cybersecurity firm 360 Advanced acquires Security Compliance Associates, enhancing advisory capabilities. #StPetersburg #Acquisition #Cybersecurity
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on September 24, 2025, cybersecurity and compliance firm 360 Advanced has proudly finalized the acquisition of Security Compliance Associates (SCA). This significant development enhances 360 Advanced's standing as a reputable authority in cybersecurity.

data.title: Franklin BSP Realty Trust announced a $1.076B CRE CLO with a 30-month reinvestment period, an 88% advance rate, and 1M CME Term SOFR+1.61% interest cost.
data.description: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. disclosed the pricing of its BSPRT 2025-FL12, a managed Commercial Real Estate Collateralized Loan Obligation totaling $1.076 billion. The FL12 offering includes a 30-month reinvestment period, with an initial advance rate of 88% and a weighted average interest cost of 1M CME Term SOFR+1.61%, excluding discount and transaction expenses. The settlement for this transaction is anticipated to occur on October 15, 2025.

data.title: Outcrop Silver reveals $20 million public offering plan.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in over a decade, now standing at 4.2%. This decrease represents an impressive decline of 1.5% compared to the previous year. The data also indicated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the same period. The report attributed this positive trend to various factors, including increased consumer spending, growth in the manufacturing sector, and government initiatives aimed at boosting employment. This news comes as a welcome development amidst concerns about economic stability in the region.

data.title: Bitcoin faces $22.6B monthly options expiry with bullish outlook, though bears remain a concern amid macroeconomic uncertainty.
data.description: The upcoming monthly options expiry for Bitcoin is valued at $22.6 billion, with bullish sentiment leading the way. However, there are concerns about macroeconomic factors that could potentially benefit bearish investors at the last minute.

data.title: Port Houston appoints Eric Casey as COO and Parker Harrison as Incoming CLO. Boosting leadership team with talented executives.
data.description: In Houston, Port Houston, a strong supporter of the Houston Ship Channel - the nation's most active waterway, has recently hired two experienced executives after a thorough search. Eric Casey is now the Chief Operating Officer (COO) and Parker Harrison has been appointed as the Incoming Chief Legal Officer (CLO). Both individuals bring valuable skills and knowledge to the team, showcasing Port Houston's dedication to recruiting top talent to aid in its operations.

data.title: Global Digestive Health Products Market set to reach USD 124.4 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 8.5%. Rising consumer interest and awareness driving market growth. Key trends include preventive health focus, increase in digestive disorder cases, product innovation, diversification, and regulatory aspects. North America, Europe, and Asian markets are prominent. Market valued at USD 55.3 billion in 2024 and expected to reach USD 59.7 billion in 2025. Market share expected to grow steadily.
data.description: The article discusses the Digestive Health Products Market and its projected growth from 2025 to 2034. In 2024, the market was valued at approximately USD 55.3 billion, expected to reach USD 59.7 billion in 2025, and projected to grow to around USD 124.4 billion in 2034 with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 8.5%. Factors driving this growth include consumer interest in preventive healthcare, awareness of gut microbiota, and the rise in digestive disorders. Innovations in probiotic stability, clean-label, and plant-based products also contribute to market expansion. Industries like Nestlé and Danone are spearheading advancements in this market, catering to consumer demands for transparency and sustainability. The market has seen expansions in product portfolios with solutions like synbiotic and postbiotic options, targeting diverse dietary preferences. While North America and Europe continue to dominate the market, Asia is experiencing rapid growth due to urbanization, rising incomes, and cultural acceptance of fermented foods. Regulatory scrutiny may slow down product approvals but ensures product safety and consumer trust. Market size in 2025 is projected at USD 59.7 billion, with a CAGR of 8.5%.

data.title: Systecon NA shares Predictive Analytics Summit 2025 outcome with senior officials in Washington, D.C. discusses future defense readiness.
data.description: Systecon North America recently wrapped up the Predictive Analytics Summit 2025 at The REACH, Kennedy Center in Washington, D.C. The event saw the participation of top executives from the Department of War (DoW), major OEMs, and sustainment experts for in-depth discussions, case studies, and forecasts regarding the impact of predictive analytics on defense readiness. The summit included keynote speeches, industry panels, and engaging sessions throughout the entire day.
